title: Bayard Vacations Unveils India's First Full
description: Bengaluru (Karnataka) [India], May 16: Bayard Vacations, headquartered in Nandini Layout, Bengaluru, today formally announced its brand positioning as India's first full-loop AI-powered premium travel tech platform -- a milestone that reframes the company's identity from a Bengaluru tour operator to a nationally scaled, technology-led travel company operating at the frontier of artificial intelligence and personalised human service.

title: integrated Learning, Interdisciplinary Programmes, and Innovation
description: Bengaluru (Karnataka) [India], May 16: REVA University announced a series of academic initiatives, interdisciplinary programmes, industry collaborations, Centres of Excellence, and scholarship opportunities aimed at preparing students for emerging sectors such as Artificial Intelligence, semiconductors, aerospace, electric mobility, automation, clean energy, advanced manufacturing, and digital infrastructure.

title: 5 useful AI tools students should know about in 2026
description: Artificial intelligence tools are becoming a regular part of how students study and manage coursework in 2026. Their growing use is improving productivity, but experts say students must use them responsibly.
content: Artificial intelligence is rapidly changing the way students study, research, and manage their academic workload. From note-taking and summarising lectures to solving complex problems and improving writing skills, AI-powered tools are becoming an ess... [2070 chars]

title: Pope Creates AI Study Group in Preparation For First Encyclical
description: Pope Leo XIV has created a study group on artificial intelligence, the Vatican said Saturday, as he gears up to release his first encyclical.
content: VATICAN CITY (AP) – Pope Leo XIV has created a study group on artificial intelligence, the Vatican said Saturday, as he gears up to release his first encyclical that is expected to emphasize the need for an ethics-based approach to the technology tha... [6284 chars]

title: The Vatican Has Said a Lot about Artificial Intelligence. A Primer Ahead of the Pope's Encyclical

content: VATICAN CITY (AP) — The Vatican is gearing up for the release of Pope Leo XIV’s first encyclical, a document expected to address artificial intelligence and insist on an ethics-based approach to the technology that prioritizes human dignity, social r... [6727 chars]

title: Will your job survive AI? Experts say new tech may replace tasks, not humans
description: As AI rapidly reshapes workplaces across industries, workers are increasingly questioning whether their jobs will survive the next decade. Experts say automation will undoubtedly replace some roles, but the safest careers may ultimately belong to people who combine technical adaptability with deeply human skills that artificial intelligence still struggles to replicate.
content: Artificial intelligence is no longer a distant disruption looming over the global economy. It is already changing how companies hire, how employees work and which skills are considered valuable in the modern workplace. Across industries, AI tools are... [5859 chars]

title: Stock markets worldwide drop from records as worries about oil prices rattle the bond market
description: NEW YORK — The US stock market fell from its records Friday and joined a worldwide drop for stocks after higher oil prices sent a shiver through the bond market. Stocks that had been caught up in the euphoria around artificial-intelligence technology led the way lower.
content: NEW YORK — The US stock market fell from its records Friday and joined a worldwide drop for stocks after higher oil prices sent a shiver through the bond market. Stocks that had been caught up in the euphoria around artificial-intelligence technology... [4308 chars]

title: Vatican and the AI Revolution: Balancing Ethics and Technology
description: The Vatican prepares to release Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical, focusing on the ethical implications of artificial intelligence (AI). The document urges an approach that upholds human dignity, social relationships, and peace, addressing societal challenges similar to those during the Industrial Revolution. The Vatican emphasizes an ethics-based approach to integrating AI into society.
content: The Vatican is on the brink of unveiling Pope Leo XIV's inaugural encyclical, a pivotal document aimed at navigating the ethical landscape of artificial intelligence (AI). It insists on a technology approach that respects human dignity, social harmon... [931 chars]
